title: Performance and QOL
description: This is a modpack I use on my server for the client and server side.
body:
This is a modpack I use on my personal Minecraft server. It focuses on Performance through many optimization mods, shaders, Distant Horizons, and Xaeros Minimap. 
This is mainly to be used as a source for my friends to quickly and safely download all the necessary mods, as well as to be used for others if they need a start to a server or client-side clean modpack.
